title: Per-Rule Latency Budget
description: Per-rule p50/p95 latency budgets. CI gate at scripts/check-per-rule-budget.ts reads the latest ILB-Flagship JSON and compares each rule's measured latency against these budgets, failing on overage beyond tolerance or hard ceiling.

rules.description: Rule id → budget. Rule ids match the ESLint rule id (e.g. 'import-next/no-cycle').

lastValidated.description: Date the budgets were last validated against an ILB-Flagship run.

source.description: Reference to the bench run that anchored the budgets (e.g. 'benchmark-results/ilb-flagship-scorecard.md (ESLint X / oxlint Y / Node Z)').

process.description: Notes on how to add a rule, raise a budget, or trigger the CI gate.

p95_hard_ceiling_ms.description: No single rule may cross this, regardless of per-rule budget.

tolerance_pct.description: Slack percent before failing. 10 means a measurement at 110% of budget still passes.

note.description: Justification for any deviation from policy defaults.
